subject: docs(todo): sync per-repo TODOs with updated pattern docs
body:
Changes after DOWNLOAD_PDF dual-approach, BURGER_MENU theme UI, and
APP_ICONS audit:

- glow-props: Add missing 180px apple-touch-icon TODO, fix matrix to Partial
- canva-grid: Reclassify pdf-lib as compliant Approach B (not deviation)
- graphiki: Recommend pdf-lib (Approach B) for canvas content, not window.print
- sun-sea-o: Add missing maskable 1024px fix (currently 512px)
- model-pear, sun-sea-o, four-ems: Add Theme UI in Burger Menu reference
- All repos with theme TODOs: Reference theme picker spec in burger menu
